zh.Errol, Perthshire, Scotland, United King: 英國蘇格蘭培爾埃羅爾
zh.Carse Of Gowrie, Perthshire, , Scotland: 蘇格蘭培爾卡斯 本 高萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eithne "Ethen" Helen de Strathearn於1188年出生在蘇格蘭培爾時，她的父親Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn38歲，母親Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn46歲。她於1205年與David de la Haye Second Lord of Erroll在蘇格蘭培爾卡斯 本 高萊結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1274年在她的家鄉享年86歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Errol, Perthshire, Scotland, United King: 英国苏格兰培爾埃羅爾
zh-hans.Carse Of Gowrie, Perthshire, , Scotland: 苏格兰培爾卡斯 本 高萊
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eithne "Ethen" Helen de Strathearn于1188年出生在苏格兰培爾时，她的父亲Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn38岁，母亲Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn46岁。她于1205年与David de la Haye Second Lord of Erroll在苏格兰培爾卡斯 本 高萊结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1274年在她的家乡享年86岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Strathearn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Strathearn in Perthshire. The placename means ‘the valley of the river Earn’, from Gaelic srath ‘valley’ + the river name Earn.

nameMeanings.name: Eithne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, apparently from eithne ‘kernel’, which was used as a term of praise in bardic poetry. St Eithne was a daughter of King Laoghaire and one of St Patrick's first converts.

variants.name: Edna
meanings: In Ireland this has been used as an Anglicized form of Eithne . The name occurs in the apocryphal Book of Tobit, where it is the name of the mother of Sarah and stepmother of Tobias. This is said to be from Hebrew ῾ednah ‘pleasure, delight’, and if so it is connected with the name of the Garden of Eden . The earliest known uses of the given name in England are in the 16th century, when it was probably imported from Ireland, although the spelling Ednah supports the idea that it was taken from the Bible.

variants.name: Etna
meanings: Traditional name, apparently from eithne ‘kernel’, which was used as a term of praise in bardic poetry. St Eithne was a daughter of King Laoghaire and one of St Patrick's first converts.

variants.name: Ena
meanings: One of several Anglicized forms of the Gaelic name Eithne . In the case of Queen Victoria's granddaughter Princess Ena (Victoria Eugénie Julia Ena,  1887–1969 ) it had a different origin: it was a misreading by the minister who baptized her off a handwritten note of the originally intended name   Eva .  In England, the name is remembered principally as that of the fearsome  Ena Sharples  in the television soap opera Coronation Street.  See also  Ina .

nameMeanings.name: "Ethen"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 19th-century revival of an Old English name, a short form of various female personal names containing ethel ‘noble’ as a first element, for example Etheldreda . The name enjoyed great popularity for a period at the beginning of the 20th century but is at present out of fashion.

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

en.lifeSummary: When Eithne "Ethen" Helen de Strathearn was born in 1188, in Perthshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn, was 38 and her mother, Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn, was 46. She married David de la Haye Second Lord of Erroll in 1205, in Carse of Gowrie, Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1274, in her hometown, at the age of 86, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eithne "Ethen" Helen de Strathearn est née en 1188, à Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé David de la Haye Second Lord of Erroll en 1205, à Carse of Gowrie, Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1274, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eithne "Ethen" Helen de Strathearn 1188 in Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn 38 und ihre Mutter Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn 46. Sie hat 1205 in Carse of Gowrie, Perthshire, Scotland David de la Haye Second Lord of Erroll geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1274 im Alter von 86 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eithne "Ethen" Helen de Strathearn è nata il nel 1188 nel Perthshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn, aveva 46 anni. Lei sposato David de la Haye Second Lord of Erroll nel 1205, nel Carse of Gowrie, Perthshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1274, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Eithne "Ethen" Helen de Strathearnが1188年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearnは38歳，母Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearnは46歳であった。1205年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアカーゼ オフ ゴウリーでDavid de la Haye Second Lord of Errollと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1274年に故郷で86歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eithne "Ethen" Helen de Strathearn(이)가 1188년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 1205년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 카스 프 가리에서 David de la Haye Second Lord of Erroll(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1274년 그녀의 고향에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eithne "Ethen" Helen de Strathearn nasceu em 1188, em Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com David de la Haye Second Lord of Erroll em 1205, em Carse of Gowrie, Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1274, em sua cidade natal, com 86 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eithne "Ethen" Helen de Strathearn родилась в 1188 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David de la Haye Second Lord of Erroll в 1205 г. в местности карс оф гоури, пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1274 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 86 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eithne "Ethen" Helen de Strathearn nació en 1188, en Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Gille Brigte Third Earl of Strathearn, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Matilda d’Aubigny, Countess of Strathearn, tenía 46 años. Se casó con David de la Haye Second Lord of Erroll en 1205, en Carse of Gowrie, Perthshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1274, en su pueblo, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
